violations.text: Per interview of staff, cold milk frothers are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as milk must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. PIC notified. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (blender and shaker bottles), located at the drying rack, were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

100% apple juice (which was open) was observed was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of juice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Coconut milk was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in another lowboy. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Two lowboys (near drive thru) were observed in poor repair. - one lowboy door gaskets were observed with a gap and had an ambient temperature of 53 degrees F. - one lowboy was observed with an ambient temperature of 65 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of cabinets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Inspector observed bathroom with no toilet tissue. PIC notified and corrected. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The receptacles in the toilet rooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of leaf litter and other debris in refuse area. Area should be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Allergen advisory statement not present at order point or on menu. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
Proper signage is lacking at the handwashing sinks in the restrooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinets and cup dispensers at the makeline have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
